description_long: This is a large, cylindrical wooden barrel with a slightly bulging midsection and reinforced by three prominent black metal hoops encircling its body. The wood staves are vertically aligned, giving the barrel a classic, rustic appearance, and the top is closed with a flat, circular wooden lid. On one side, a bold black radioactive warning symbol is painted, indicating the barrel is intended to store or transport hazardous materials. The wood has a medium brown tone with visible grain, and the metal bands are matte black, providing structural integrity. The surface appears hard and slightly rough, typical of untreated or lightly finished wood. The overall construction suggests it is robust and suitable for industrial or hazardous urban environments.
description: A large wooden barrel with black metal hoops and a radioactive warning symbol, featuring a closed wooden top and a rugged, industrial look.
description_view_0: The barrel is seen from an angle showing the wooden staves, black metal hoops, and a partial view of the radioactive warning symbol.
description_view_1: This view clearly displays the radioactive warning symbol on the side, along with the full curvature of the barrel and the metal hoops.
description_view_2: The barrel is shown without any visible markings, highlighting the wood texture and the symmetry of the metal hoops.
description_view_3: A plain view of the barrel's side, focusing on the wood grain and the structural bands, with no visible symbols or markings.
